creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
At the time of writing, I can no longer reproduce this bug. 

Ignoring the yellow alert, might VBoxSVGA be a workaround?


=====
Guest
=====

! VBoxSVGA in lieu of VMSVGA

$ date ; uptime ; uname -v
